hooks.command: file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *"packages/ui"* || "$file" == *"packages/web"* ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && bun run --cwd packages/ui test --bail 2>&1 | grep -E '(FAIL|PASS|snapshot|✓|✗|error)' | head -20; fi

file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *"packages/ui"* || "$file" == *"packages/utils"* || "$file" == *"packages/core"* ]]; then cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && packages/ui/node_modules/.bin/tsc --noEmit -p packages/ui/tsconfig.json 2>&1 | head -30; fi

file="$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT_FILE_PATH"; if [[ "$file" == *"packages/ui/components/"*".tsx" && "$file" != *"index.ts" && "$file" != *".test."* ]]; then name=$(basename "$file" .tsx); if ! grep -q "$name" "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR/packages/ui/components/index.ts"; then echo "WARNING: $name.tsx has no matching export in packages/ui/components/index.ts"; fi; fi
